name: bioservices
tagline: Python wrapper skill giving a unified API to 40+ bioinformatics web services (UniProt, KEGG, ChEMBL, PDB, PSICQUIC, etc.).
verdict: Clean, scoped skill. Network calls go only to the public bioinformatics APIs it exists to wrap, the only user-provided value is a contact email required by NCBI's own BLAST usage policy (not a secret), install is pinned to bioservices==1.16.0 from PyPI, and no hidden or manipulative instructions were found. Safe to install for bioinformatics/data-science wor
